page_content:
Formerly: BUMK758N.

BUMK770 Retail Analytics (2 Credits)

Planning and implementing retail marketing strategies often involve sophisticated analytics. This course will teach the analytical tools needed to develop retail strategies. Both store and non-store (catalog, Internet) retailing are discussed. Also, students will learn how to evaluate the impact of environmental trends in the consumer market, competition, the economy and technology on retail strategy in the U.S. and global market. Restriction: Must be in Business and Management (Master's) program; or permission of BMGT-Robert H. Smith School of Business.

Credit Only Granted for. BUMK758M or BUMK770.
